subcodes.first_line: Thy letter reached Us and attained unto the hearing of this Wronged One. O Hussein! Hearken unto the Call of the Divine Lote-Tree which doth [3.5s]... ...That which hath been made manifest in this preeminent, this most exalted Revelation, stands unparalleled in the annals of the past
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات رسید و باصغاء مظلوم فائز گشت ان یا حسین بشنو ندای سدره منتهی را که در
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @God's knowledge, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
